edge_cases.confidence_note: 4 edge cases identified, 2 fixed (uncapped refs, dual table maintenance), 2 acceptable risk. Well-bounded — this is a static markdown edit task.

premortem.skip_reason: Static markdown edits — no deployment, no runtime, no operational surface.

review.skip_reason: Local adversarial thorough — 10 findings all addressed. Saving context for implementation.

test.confidence_note: Audit found WU-2 and WU-3 already complete. WU-1 and WU-4 files exist with correct structures. WU-5 Phase 2 deliberately inactive. ~85-90% of spec work was implemented across prior sessions.

execute.notes: Closed as substantially complete. WU-2 (insight capture) and WU-3 (orphan rescue) fully done. WU-1/WU-4/WU-5 partially done. Remaining Phase 2 plugin activation is a separate concern tracked in plugin-enhancers.md.
